privileged_info_summary: The poker_settlement task uses synthetic data created by a bash script (setup_task.sh), containing 8 players with varying buy-ins and final chip counts. All players start with $50 initial buy-ins, with optional $25 rebuys (up to 2). The CSV data maintains perfect zero-sum: total buy-ins ($600) equals total final chips ($600), and net positions (profit/loss per player) sum to exactly $0. The task timeout is 180 seconds with a 15-step limit. Success requires 75% score, with zero-sum validation being the critical 30% scoring component. Data is not from a real external source but synthetically generated to test spreadsheet reconciliation skills.
